quote: Nakagawa Hiroshi 中川裕 (ed.) (2000). アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集 1–24. [A collection of Ainu oral-literature texts, vols. 1–24 (2000–2025)].
issue: The entry states publication dates spanning 2000–2025, but the work is attributed to the year 2000. This creates a chronological inconsistency: a work cannot be published in 2000 and continue through 2025 unless it is a multi-year series, which should be clarified.
suggestion: Revise to clarify the publication range, e.g., 'vols. 1–24 (2000–2025)' should be moved outside the title brackets or explicitly noted as a multi-volume series published over those years.

quote: Nakagawa, Hiroshi 中川裕 (2022). Verbal number. Handbook of the Ainu language (HJLL 12). Ed. Anna Bugaeva. Berlin & Boston: De Gruyter Mouton.
issue: Inconsistent formatting of author name: 'Nakagawa, Hiroshi' uses a comma, while other entries (e.g., line 155) use 'Nakagawa Hiroshi' without a comma. This violates internal orthographic consistency in the bibliography.
suggestion: Standardize author formatting: remove the comma in 'Nakagawa, Hiroshi' to match 'Nakagawa Hiroshi'.

quote: Nakagawa, Hiroshi 中川裕 (2022). Parts of speech — with a focus on the classification of nouns. Handbook of the Ainu language (HJLL 12). Ed. Anna Bugaeva. 473–500. Berlin & Boston: De Gruyter Mouton.
issue: Same comma inconsistency as line 157: 'Nakagawa, Hiroshi' diverges from the standard 'Nakagawa Hiroshi' format used elsewhere.
